label: Remove blur_shimmer base — 0px at rest, kick-only blur
notes: GLSL portal shader already has inherent softness from FBM warp. blur_shimmer base of 4px was double-blurring. New: base = 0, kick drives full range. At sub_bass=0.06 (quiet): ~1px (negligible). At sub_bass=0.81 (kick): ~13px. Portals are as sharp as the GLSL allows at rest.

operations.before: int(4 + op('audio_ref')['sub_bass'] * 14) if op('audio_ref') is not None else 4
operations.after: int(op('audio_ref')['sub_bass'] * 16) if op('audio_ref') is not None else 0
